rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Live-test beats docs for runtime-behavior claims
Known correct Claude Code facts — /context shows budget by category
Sessions are the unit of work
Source URL + type label mandatory; maintainer-block scope
One-sentence action lead-in with command verb
Skills by name, never by path
Forcing functions live in prompts, not body

platform_claims_checked.claim: /context slash command shows context budget by category (system prompt, messages, memory, skills)

audit_notes: REFRESH re-fire triggered by addition of orient-and-introspect-3 to the prompt registry. Three surface-4 prompts evaluated: orient-and-introspect-1 (repo read), orient-and-introspect-2 (introspect), orient-and-introspect-3 (/context). All three pass prompt-mechanics checks. The /context claim ('shows how full your context window is, total used and breakdown by category') is the live-tested corrected framing from 2026-04-27 — NOT the old wrong 'ground truth for file list' framing. No URLs, no skill invocations, no citations in student-facing body. Quality stamp technical@ should advance to 3605eee (current HEAD at time of this audit; exercise file has uncommitted changes).
